'''Red 8''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was assigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red8" /> and stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="ANH" />

The X-wing was assigned to [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Bren Quersey/Legends|Bren Quersey]] by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Quersey managed to score a weapons hit<ref name="CCG-Red8" /> on the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]]<ref name="CCG-Black2">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Black 2}}</ref> [[Black 2]] during the engagement.<ref name="CCG-Red8" />
